Hi ghlights of the Week
The recent string of sanctions being imposed on Russia are redrawing new
jhhnhu
trade routes, reorganizing global trade along political lines, defying
geography, and efficiency. Due to these complex trade dynamics, it is
increasingly difficult for ship owners to decide whether to send their aging
assets for recycling and benefit from the elevated steel prices, or to wait
for newer trading opportunities being created by changing trade routes. The prices being offered by the ship recyclers from subcontinent remained
strong with a steady demand from Pakistan and India to secure tonnage,
while the buyers from Bangladesh opted to remain on the sidelines for yet
